name: Bread Stuffing or Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Parsley leaves (or 2 teaspoons dried parsley)
1 cup Hot water or turkey broth
1/2 teaspoon Dried thyme (or 1/4 teaspoon dried thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss to mix well.
2. Stuff the mixture into a 10-pound turkey or 4 cornish hens.
3. Bake at 350-375°F for 30 minutes. Serve 4-6 portions.
Note: This recipe provides 100 calories per serving, with 20 grams of carbohydrates, 5 grams of protein, and 2 grams of fat. It is a good source of fiber and can be paired with low-fat gravy for added flavor without extra calories or fat.
